entry.title: 2AM Confessions
entry.summary:
Author: reveriery

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,009Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: pairing: Jason todd x fem! readerA/N: This might be OOC for jason. first time writing so very rusty. Pictures from pinterest. Jason Todd belongs to DC. Feedback (constructive criticism is appreciated).

entry.title: A Different Life With You
entry.summary:
Author: veena_the_aloo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,322Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 4

Summary: Jason doesn't wanna die. He really doesn't. He prays to whatever god that will listen to not let him die again.Whatever god did seem to be listening seemed to have given pity. Because when he wakes, he wakes up ten years older, in a house he doesn't recognize, married to a woman he doesn't know and with kids he's never seen. He's in another man's body. (Can be read as Reader or OC since FMC is never directly referred to by name or described)

entry.title: Invited In
entry.summary:
Author: ToTheStars8

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,899Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 65

Summary: Bruce hasn't seen Jason in over a week, and he's concerned. Tracking him down, Bruce expects to find his son either dead or up to something no good. Instead, he finds Jason living happily with a family Bruce never knew he had.

entry.title: Good Luck, Babe!
entry.summary:
Author: VenusCrytrap

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 163,365Chapters: 31/?Kudos: 3,208

Summary: A decade after washing out of your mask, you try to piece together a decent life as Bruce Wayne's only civillian adoptee. Your father believes that you deserve more than what the manor has to offer. If only his wards got the memo.

entry.title: Books and bars
entry.summary:
Author: ReaderBOMG

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,954Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 79

Summary: When a drunk, heart broken librarian swipes right on Jason Todd, their story unfolds in the crime filled streets of Gotham as many secrets are revealed to each other with many dates. This is a light hearted fic of Librarian reader and Jason inspired by the Wayne family adventures and it contains a lot of fluff and smut and even more typos and mistakes. But I still hope you guys enjoy my first work!<3

entry.title: Getting Around Gotham, or: Five Drabble Trysts with Batfam Men, and One 3500 Word Epilogue About How You All Realized It
entry.summary:
Author: gone (relocation)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,000Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 31

Summary: A fresh arrival in Gotham and trying to meet new people, you find yourself entangled with five different men, unaware that they are all connected, just as they are unaware of each other's connection to you, until you all end up at one party. (In your defence, they all had different surnames.) - Inspired by every time I've thought "What if someone dated everyone in the Batfam, and never realized it because they all have different surnames?"- Written for the characters in general, most recently (but certainly not only) influenced by WFA- Only Jason got outright smut, sorry Dick et al.- Drabbles can pretty much be enjoyed separately, but they are meant to be read together with the longer epilogue.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Pretty Bird
entry.summary:
Author: locallilkiddo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,897Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 176

Summary: The five times a vigilante saved you, and the one time he didn’t. You work at the local diner in Park Row where anyone of any walks of life are allowed in, including the titular Red Hood. You keep bumping into him when you’re at your lowest, and he begins to remind you so much of your childhood hero, Robin.

entry.title: Loving Machine
entry.summary:
Author: Spenc56623

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,416Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 50

Summary: After a long night of work, getting home and finally relaxing, the one and only Red Hood falls into your apartment. Thinking it is his safe house, he is confused why you're here but when you notice him bleeding, your nurse instincts take over. Ignoring your fear, you patch him up. He leaves with A promise, threat, or warning, maybe even all three, that he will be back at some point in time.

entry.title: Needles don't scare me
entry.summary:
Author: darkdustyblue

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,115Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Jason is studying Philosophy in Literature, Siena is a Criminal Justice major. Both have family trauma, both hate life, both decide to become friends. Jason is struggling with his mental health and navigating his first civilian friendship. Siena is disowned, moved from Italy to Gotham on a whim. She is a Robin die hard fan. Jason has a complicated relationship with his family. They both need someone to lean on and help them carry their respective burdens. Not technically Reader as it's a character but can be read as self insert due to limited and easy to skip character descriptions.

entry.title: Outsiders Inspired Batboys: Jason Todd x Chubby! Reader x Tim Drake
entry.summary:
Author: River_Shayde

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,206Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 22

Summary: Ever wonder what would happen if Dick had to raise Jason, Tim, and Damian during the 1960s in Gotham? What if they all met a once privileged girl who lost everything and now has to acclimate life in the greaser side of town? How will they all interact and face the villains, socs, and family issues that make up their daily life?Reader turns 18 a few days after meeting the family, and this will mainly be a Jason and Tim love story. There are two separate endings. Setting inspired by Grease and the Outsiders.

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 99,322Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 577

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"
